title: Figure 1 in Escherichia coli expression and characterization of -amylase from Geobacillus thermodenitrificans DSM-465
author: Al-Amri, A.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. SDS-PAGE photograph indicating the expression and purification of alpha amylase. Lane C- control experiment (without gene), Lane-M. Protein marker (ThermoFisher Scientific PageRulerTM Prestained Protein Ladder, 10 kDa to 180 kDa), Lane E, experimental with expression of gene, Lane P, partially purified enzyme alpha amylase. The molecular weight of the purified enzyme was found as 63 kDa on SDS-PAGE.
steps_raw: Figure 1. SDS-PAGE photograph indicating the expression and purification of alpha amylase. Lane C- control experiment (without gene), Lane-M. Protein marker (ThermoFisher Scientific PageRulerTM Prestained Protein Ladder, 10 kDa to 180 kDa), Lane E, experimental with expression of gene, Lane P, partially purified enzyme alpha amylase. The molecular weight of the purified enzyme was found as 63 kDa on SDS-PAGE.
